annotation_covariate: paired RefSeq on H1; optional until exact sequence-dictionary audit
qv_covariate: catalog QV absent; acquisition must bind Merqury QV and each haplotype must be >=40
busco_covariate: both chromosome level; length ratio 0.999; require BUSCO complete >=0.90 and missing <=0.05 on both
raw_read_covariate: HiFi named on both exact reports; raw-read runs must be frozen selectively by acquisition
kmer_covariate: Hifiasm; no frozen collapse metric; require k-mer spectrum plus BUSCO duplicated <=0.05 and no unexplained copy-number asymmetry
